boundary: Same command and same scale are run against v1.0 and current v1.5 candidate. Cells with backend errors are unavailable, not zero-speedup results. This runner does not authorize public speedup wording by itself.

excluded_apps.apple_rt_demo: excluded from v1.5 active Embree+OptiX scope; Apple RT frozen before v2.1
excluded_apps.hiprt_ray_triangle_hitcount: excluded from v1.5 active Embree+OptiX scope; HIPRT frozen before v2.1
excluded_apps.polygon_set_jaccard: excluded from v1.5 because COLLECT_K_BOUNDED is deferred to v1.5.1
excluded_apps.segment_polygon_anyhit_rows: excluded from v1.5 because COLLECT_K_BOUNDED is deferred to v1.5.1
